finding: Concurrent refresh not serialized (check-expired -> refresh -> use is not atomic)
evidence: validAccessToken read-modify-write happens outside the actor
fix: Serialize refresh inside the TokenManager actor

finding: Pagination loop never advances pageToken; only the first page syncs
evidence: while loop reads pageToken but never reassigns response.nextPageToken
fix: Assign response.nextPageToken back to pageToken before the next iteration

finding: try? swallows a recoverable decode error inside the sync loop
fix: Use do/catch and surface a typed SyncError
